SELECT toInt256OrZero(value) AS int_value FROM test_values;
SELECT toInt256OrZero(value) AS int_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE value LIKE '-%' AND LENGTH(value) < 4);
SELECT value, toInt256OrZero(value) AS int_value FROM test_values WHERE int_value = 0;
SELECT value, CASE WHEN toInt256OrZero(value) = 0 THEN 'Invalid' ELSE 'Valid' END AS value_status FROM (SELECT value FROM test_values);
SELECT value, toInt256OrZero(value), toInt256OrZero(toString(value)) FROM test_values;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT toInt256OrZero(value) FROM test_values) tmp;
SELECT SUM(toInt256OrZero(value)) AS total_value FROM test_values WHERE toInt256OrZero(value) > 0;
WITH (SELECT SUM(toInt256OrZero(value)) FROM test_values) AS total FROM (SELECT toInt256OrZero(value) AS single_value FROM test_values) WHERE single_value IS NOT NULL;
